top_signals.title: Does Botanix’s failure prove Bitcoiners don’t care about DeFi?
top_signals.summary: The failure of Botanix suggests that Bitcoiners still prefer Ethereum DeFi to Bitcoin L2s. How can Bitcoin L2s change to win hodlers over?

top_signals.title: I recreated all my favourite TV tropes, from crawling through pipes to being two kids in a trenchcoat
top_signals.summary: TV tropes told Amelia Tait that life would be spent crawling through ventilation shafts and avoiding quicksand. The reality was very different… until now When I was old enough to know better but young enough for it to still be an excuse, I used to try and run through walls like Wile E. Coyote. I [...]

top_signals.title: ‘One Piece’ manga characters join Paris wax museum
top_signals.summary: The 10 wax dolls of the Straw Hat Crew members are the first Japanese anime characters to join the Grevin Museum.
